previews.desc: 15,000+ labeled images of black pod disease and mirids from 200 West African farms.

previews.title: West African Market Dialects
previews.desc: 500 hours of recorded negotiations in local markets across Benin and Ivory Coast.

previews.title: Regional Soil Nutrient Index
previews.desc: Comprehensive chemical analysis and yield history from 5,000+ palm oil smallholders.

datasets.title: Featured Datasets
datasets.desc: Ready-to-use ground truth data for model fine-tuning.

specialization.title: Our Specialization
specialization.desc: Expertise in African languages and agricultural domains.
specialization.field_data_desc: Data collected directly from the field.

hero.desc: High-quality annotated Datasets in local African languages for AI companies and AgriTech solutions.

text.title: Text Collection
text.desc: Transcriptions, translations, and generation of local textual corpora.
text.entity_example: <0>[Crop: Sorghum]</0> shows signs of <1>[Pathogen: Anthracnose]</1> in <2>[Region: Northern Ghana]</2>.

audio.title: Audio Corpora
audio.desc: Native voice recordings for training Speech-to-Text models.

image.title: Visual Data
image.desc: Annotated agricultural images for disease detection and yield prediction.

dataset.title: Ready-to-Use Datasets
dataset.desc: API access to our qualified and expert-validated databases.

cta.title: Ready to power your AI?
cta.desc: Join the global AgriTech leaders who rely on our high-quality data.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy describes how Nyansa AI collects, uses and protects your personal data in compliance with GDPR and applicable local regulations.

data_collection.title: Data Collection
data_collection.content: We collect only the data necessary to provide our annotation and dataset creation services. This includes:

items.1: Identification data (name, email) for managing user and contributor accounts.
items.2: GPS location data collected only during active field missions, with explicit consent.
items.3: Submitted content (audio, images, text) as part of agricultural data collection missions.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content: Under GDPR, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:

1.title: Right of Access
1.desc: You can request a copy of your personal data held by Nyansa AI at any time.

2.title: Right of Rectification
2.desc: You can correct any inaccurate or incomplete data held about you.

3.title: Right to Erasure
3.desc: You can request deletion of your data under certain legal conditions.

4.title: Right to Portability
4.desc: You can receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format.

5.title: Right to Object
5.desc: You can object to processing of your data for marketing or profiling purposes.

legal_basis.title: Legal Basis for Processing
legal_basis.content: Processing of your data is based on your explicit consent, the performance of a service contract, or compliance with applicable legal obligations. You may withdraw your consent at any time without affecting the lawfulness of prior processing.

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.content: Your data is kept only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected. Active contributor data is retained for 3 years after last activity. Data anonymized for research purposes may be kept indefinitely.

contact.title: Contact our Data Protection Officer
contact.content: For any questions about data protection or to exercise your rights, contact our DPO team:

settings.desc: Manage platform settings and API keys.

api.title: API Keys
api.desc: Use these keys to authenticate your data pipelines or external validators with the Nyansa AI ecosystem.
api.no_keys: No active API keys. Generate one to get started.
api.revoke_confirm: Are you sure you want to revoke this key? It will no longer be usable.
api.name_prompt: Enter a name for this key (e.g. Production Pipeline):
api.security_note: Security Note: Never share your secret keys in public code repositories.
api.success_desc: Please copy this key now. For your security, it will never be shown again.

dashboard.title: Dashboard Overview
dashboard.desc: Real-time performance metrics for global agricultural linguistic processing.
dashboard.trends_desc: Volume of incoming linguistic analysis requests

agents.title: Agent Reputation Management
agents.desc: Monitor quality scores, detect fraud, and manage field agent access.

languages.title: Languages & Experts
languages.desc: Manage supported linguistic data sets and coordinate with agricultural domain annotators.

experts.title: Linguistic Experts & Annotators
experts.desc: Directory of certified agricultural domain specialists.

pipeline.title: Translation Pipeline
pipeline.desc: Current model accuracy across all enabled local dialects.

header.title: We build the data that enables AI to understand African languages for agriculture.
header.desc: At NYANSA, we transform local African languages into intelligent data to train artificial intelligence. Our goal: to make agricultural technologies accessible to everyone, even in rural and multilingual areas.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: To make agricultural intelligence accessible by collecting, structuring, and annotating African languages into AI-actionable data.
mission.img_alt: Agronomist collecting voice and agricultural field data in Africa

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: A world where every farmer can use artificial intelligence tools in their own language to improve their production, income, and resilience.

stats.title: Building the linguistic infrastructure for AI in Africa
stats.s1_d: Audio and visual data used to train agricultural AI models
stats.s2_d: Representing the linguistic diversity of agricultural zones
stats.s3_d: Annotators, farmers, and linguists validating the data

founder.title: Meet Our Founder & CEO
founder.mention: Passionate about artificial intelligence and African languages, he is building NYANSA to make AI accessible to everyone.

crops.title: Cacao
crops.desc: Integrated Datasets for Moniliophthora roreri detection and localized Swahili/Akan voice support for farmers.

crops.title: Hévéa
crops.desc: Rubber tree latex flow analysis and fungal infection monitoring using high-precision imagery from field experts.

crops.title: Palmier
crops.desc: Sustainable farming benchmarks and harvest cycle predictions across multi-regional climatic data points.

ecosystem.title: Crops Integrated in Our Knowledge Graph.
ecosystem.desc: Our AI models are specifically trained on high-value perennial and industrial crops essential to global food security.

hero.title: Linguistic Intelligence for Sustainable Growth.
hero.desc: Bridging the gap between agricultural fieldwork and data science through multi-modal AI Datasets and localized linguistic models.

bento.title: Multimodal Linguistic Data.
bento.image_d: High-resolution field imagery with expert segmentation for pest, disease, and nutritional deficiency identification. Validated by certified agronomists across 12 climatic zones.
bento.voices_d: Natural speech Datasets in regional dialects for offline voice-to-action tools.
bento.diag_d: Semantic analysis of expert reports and localized farmer feedback logs.

impact.title: Transforming Field Data into Actionable Decisions.
impact.c1_d: Instant identification of phytosanitary threats using computer vision optimized for low-bandwidth environments. Reduce crop loss by up to 40% through early intervention.
impact.c2_d: Interactive agricultural advice delivered in local dialects, enabling non-literate farmers to access global agronomic expertise via voice commands.
impact.c3_d: AI-driven predictive modeling for harvest volumes and quality grades, helping cooperatives and exporters manage supply chain logistics efficiently.

header.title: Let's grow your data capabilities together.
header.desc: Connecting precision agriculture with advanced linguistic models. Reach out to discuss Dataset curation, language modeling, or field research partnerships.

info.hub_d: Strategically located in the heart of West Africa's agricultural trade.

datasets.title: Datasets Catalog
datasets.desc: Access curated linguistic and agricultural Datasets for training high-precision AI models. Our data is ethically sourced and verified by domain experts.

explorer.title: Interactive Dataset Preview
explorer.desc: Experience the quality and precision of our datasets firsthand. Toggle AI annotations or listen to native agricultural dialects.

audio_panel.transcript_text: Majani ya mahindi yana matangamoto ya manjano na yanaanza kukauka.
audio_panel.translation_text: The maize leaves have yellow spots and are starting to dry up.

banner.title: Don't see what you need?
banner.desc: We offer custom data collection and annotation services for specific regional dialects.

hero.title: African Languages We Support
hero.desc: Bridging the linguistic gap with high-precision Datasets. We empower agricultural technology by digitizing and structuring low-resource languages for the global market.

value.title: Low-resource languages = high value for AI
value.desc: For millions of farmers across Africa, language remains a barrier to modern agricultural intelligence. By focusing on low-resource languages, Nyansa AI creates the foundational Datasets necessary for inclusive AI models.
value.quote: "Language inclusivity is the next frontier of digital sovereignty in global agriculture."

grid.title: Supported Dialects & Regions
grid.desc: Explore our current linguistic coverage. Each Dataset is curated with local linguists and agricultural experts.

request.title: Request a Language
request.desc: Don't see a specific dialect? We take requests for specific agricultural Datasets.

tech.title: Scientific Precision in Every Dialect
tech.desc: Our annotation process follows the highest standards of linguistic science. We don't just translate; we contextualize terminology for specific agricultural contexts like pest management, irrigation techniques, and market fluctuations.

audio.title: High Fidelity Audio
audio.desc: Studio-quality recordings for robust speech-to-text training.

header.title: Specialized Services for Global Agronomy.
header.desc: Bridging the gap between linguistic diversity and agricultural productivity through high-fidelity data annotation and custom Dataset curation.

text.title: Text Annotation
text.desc: Precision labeling for low-resource agricultural dialects and technical terminology. We transform raw field notes and agronomist reports into structured training data.
text.entity_example: <0>[Crop: Sorghum]</0> shows signs of <1>[Pathogen: Anthracnose]</1> in <2>[Region: Northern Ghana]</2>.

audio.title: Audio Annotation
audio.desc: Capturing the human voice of agriculture. We specialize in transcribing and annotating rural farmer voice logs for automated advisory systems.
audio.f1: Dialect-aware phonetic transcription for regional speech patterns.
audio.f2: Sentiment analysis to detect critical distress in rural messaging.
audio.f3: Speaker diarization for multi-agent advisory conversations.

image.title: Image Annotation
image.desc: Training computer vision for field-level pest detection, crop health monitoring, and satellite-based land use classification.

pipeline.title: The Dataset Pipeline
pipeline.desc: From raw data harvest to enterprise-grade ML-ready Datasets. Our end-to-end linguistic engineering process.
pipeline.s1_d: Sourcing authentic field data from 40+ rural hub partners.
pipeline.s2_d: Linguistic expert verification and semantic tagging.
pipeline.s3_d: Three-tier validation for scientific and linguistic accuracy.
pipeline.s4_d: API-ready JSON/CSV Datasets with full metadata.

legal.meta_desc: Legal notice for the Nyansa AI platform — publisher, hosting, intellectual property.
legal.title: Legal Notice
legal.intro: In accordance with applicable legal provisions, here is the legal information relating to the Nyansa AI platform.
legal.contact_desc: For any questions regarding this legal notice:
legal.s1_p: The Nyansa AI website and all associated applications (API, mobile app) are published by:
legal.s2_p1: The Nyansa AI platform is hosted on secure cloud infrastructure, operating in compliance with international data security standards (ISO 27001). Servers are deployed in Europe and Africa to ensure optimal performance for our users.
legal.s2_p2: For any urgent requests related to technical infrastructure or system security, please contact our team at:
legal.s3_p1: All content on the Nyansa AI platform — including but not limited to texts, interfaces, linguistic databases, agricultural datasets, software, source code, trademarks, logos and trade names — is the exclusive property of Nyansa AI or its duly authorized partners.
legal.s3_p2: These elements are protected by Ivorian and international laws on intellectual property and copyright. Any reproduction, modification, publication or exploitation, in whole or in part, without prior written authorization is strictly prohibited and constitutes a violation that may result in legal proceedings.
legal.s4_p: Nyansa AI processes personal data in strict compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR - EU 2016/679) and applicable Ivorian legislation. To exercise your rights or obtain information on data processing, consult our Privacy Policy or contact our Data Protection Officer.
legal.s5_p: The platform only uses technically necessary cookies for the proper functioning of the service (session management, JWT authentication). These cookies do not require prior consent. No advertising tracking cookies are placed without your explicit agreement.
legal.s6_p1: Nyansa AI strives to ensure the accuracy and currency of published information. However, we cannot guarantee completeness at all times. Nyansa AI cannot be held responsible for direct or indirect damages resulting from the use of the platform, temporary service unavailability, or the interpretation of proposed data.
legal.s6_p2: Links to third-party sites on our platform do not engage Nyansa AI's responsibility for the content of those external sites.
legal.s7_p: These legal notices are governed by Ivorian law. In the event of a dispute and failing amicable resolution within 30 days, the competent courts of Abidjan (Ivory Coast) shall have exclusive jurisdiction.

terms.meta_desc: General terms of use for the Nyansa AI platform.
terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: By accessing and using the Nyansa AI platform — whether the web application, API, or mobile field collection application — you unconditionally accept these general terms of use.
terms.contact_desc: For any questions regarding these terms of use:
terms.s1_p1: These General Terms of Use (GTU) govern the access, navigation and use of all services offered by Nyansa AI, including:
terms.s1_i1: The web platform for managing and consulting agricultural datasets.
terms.s1_i2: The REST API for programmatic access to linguistic and agricultural data.
terms.s1_i3: The Flutter mobile application dedicated to field data collection.
terms.s1_i4: The administration panel for validation and project management teams.
terms.s1_p2: These GTU apply to all users: corporate clients, field contributors (agents), linguistic experts, and public site visitors.
terms.s2_p: Access to certain platform features requires creating a user account. By registering, you agree to:
terms.s2_i1: Provide accurate, complete and up-to-date identity information when registering.
terms.s2_i2: Maintain the confidentiality of your login credentials and password.
terms.s2_i3: Immediately notify Nyansa AI of any unauthorized access or compromise of your account.
terms.s2_i4: Be responsible for all actions performed from your account, whether authorized or not.
terms.s2_p2: Nyansa AI reserves the right to refuse the creation of an account or suspend an existing account without prior justification.
terms.s3_p: Field agents using the mobile application to submit data (audio, images, texts) agree to:
terms.s3_i1: Collect only authentic data, in the geographical location indicated by the mission.
terms.s3_i2: Ensure the technical quality of recordings (audio clarity, image sharpness, text legibility).
terms.s3_i3: Ensure the consent of persons potentially recorded in the data.
terms.s3_i4: Not submit any data that infringes human dignity, privacy or third-party rights.
terms.s4_p1: Field agents are remunerated in FCFA per validated entry, according to the rates displayed for each mission on the mobile application. Validation is performed automatically by our quality assurance system, supplemented by human review for ambiguous cases.
terms.s4_p2: Payment terms: Payments are processed within 7 business days following validation of submissions. Nyansa AI reserves the right to suspend or refuse payment in cases of proven fraud, out-of-zone data, insufficient quality, or violation of these terms.
terms.s4_p3: In case of dispute over a payment refusal, the agent may submit an appeal by email within 14 days of notification.
terms.s5_p: It is strictly prohibited to use the Nyansa AI platform to:
terms.s5_i1: Submit fraudulent, falsified, duplicated or out-of-zone data.
terms.s5_i2: Attempt to circumvent, manipulate or deceive automated fraud detection or quality assurance systems.
terms.s5_i3: Use bots, automated scripts or any artificial means to generate submissions.
terms.s5_i4: Access features or data not authorized by your account (intrusion attempt).
terms.s5_i5: Share your access credentials with third parties or allow others to use your account.
terms.s5_i6: Systematically extract, scrape or copy platform data without written authorization.
terms.s5_i7: Use the platform for illegal, unethical purposes or in violation of third-party rights.
terms.s6_p1: By submitting data via the platform, the contributor grants Nyansa AI a worldwide, non-exclusive, irrevocable and royalty-free license to use, reproduce, process and exploit the submitted data for the purposes of creating artificial intelligence datasets.
terms.s6_p2: The contributor warrants that they hold all necessary rights over submitted data and releases Nyansa AI from any liability in case of third-party claims.
terms.s7_p: Nyansa AI strives to ensure platform availability 24/7. However, interruptions may occur for planned maintenance, updates or force majeure events. Nyansa AI shall not be held responsible for any losses related to these interruptions.
terms.s8_p1: Nyansa AI reserves the right to modify these terms at any time to adapt to legal, technical or commercial developments. Users will be notified by email of any substantial change at least 15 days before it comes into effect.
terms.s8_p2: Continued use of the platform after the new terms come into effect constitutes tacit acceptance. If you refuse the new terms, you must stop using the platform and delete your account.
terms.s9_p1: Nyansa AI may suspend or terminate a user's access to the platform, with or without notice, in case of proven or suspected violation of these terms, without giving rise to any compensation.
terms.s9_p2: Users may at any time request account deletion by contacting our support team. Deletion leads to erasure of personal data within the timelines set out in our Privacy Policy.
terms.s10_p: These general terms are subject to Ivorian law. Any dispute relating to their interpretation or execution shall fall under the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Abidjan, after an attempt at amicable resolution within 30 days.
